approaches.title: Separate value and minimum stacks
approaches.summary: Maintains the stack values separately from a stack containing the current minima, updating the minimum stack only when a new minimum is pushed or removed.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Implemented MinStack with separate value and minimum vectors, providing constant-time push, pop, top, and minimum lookup

approaches.title: Per-element minimum tracking
approaches.summary: Stores each value together with the minimum value for the stack at that position, allowing minimum retrieval directly from the top tuple.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Changed the representation to a single vector of (value, minimum-so-far) tuples, simplifying pop and minimum tracking
